function.name: add_rule
function.description: Add an exchange rule to the game economy. Call this when you observe a trade, crafting recipe, or conversion that should be recorded. Rules are content-addressed; storing the same rule twice is a no-op.

source_item.description: The item being given or consumed (e.g. 'gold', 'wood', 'mana').

source_qty.description: Quantity of source_item required for the exchange.

target_qty.description: Quantity of target_item received from the exchange.

rule_id.description: Human-readable label for this rule (e.g. 'blacksmith-trade', 'merchant-buy'). Optional.

db.description: Path to the balancelab SQLite database. Defaults to .balancelab/economy.db.

function.name: scan_economy
function.description: Scan all stored exchange rules for arbitrage exploits using Bellman-Ford graph analysis. Returns an exploit report listing any circular trade paths that yield net gain (gain_ratio > 1.0). Call this after adding rules to detect balance issues.

db.description: Path to the balancelab SQLite database. Defaults to .balancelab/economy.db.

function.name: list_reports
function.description: List all previously generated exploit scan reports, ordered by most recent first. Each report includes exploit count and gain ratios. Use this to review scan history without re-running the analysis.

db.description: Path to the balancelab SQLite database. Defaults to .balancelab/economy.db.
